COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-18-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: B. Fields #7235

Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. for Plaintiff: Credit Trade Assoc., Inc.
Plaintiff's Witness Susan Strebeck was placed under oath and direct examined.
No appearance by Defendant Daniel Lee Walker, aka Daniel Walker, aka Daniel L. Walker, ind. dba Sut5ter Creek Palace.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for Judgment as follows:

Damages - $7,369.82
Prejudgment interest - $1,616.00
Costs - $290.00
Sanctions - $340.00
Total - $9,615.82
Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-18-2011 Assigned To Trial Court
